title: Citrusy Dense Brazilian Berry Stir-fry
description: A citrusy and dense Brazilian dish featuring frozen mixed berries, caramelize them with a touch of sweetness for a weeknight meal that caters to pescatarian preferences.

ingredients.name: Jalapenos, finely chopped
ingredients.notes: adjust quantity based on spice preference

instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add jalapenos, ginger, and cumin to the pan. Cook for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Stir in mixed berries and cook for an additional 3-5 minutes or until berries begin to soften and release their juices.
Fold in sliced almonds and continue cooking for another 2 minutes allowing the flavors to meld together.
Serve hot as a main course.
